channel.title: Paperclip Blog
channel.description: Technical deep dives, tutorials, and industry analysis on AI agent orchestration, running zero-human companies, and the future of agent-native work.

item.title: The AI Agent Orchestration Market in 2026: Frameworks, Engines, and the Missing Company Layer
item.description: Analysis of the 2026 AI agent orchestration market across frameworks, workflow engines, enterprise platforms, and the emerging Company OS category. Where Paperclip fits and what's next.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: AI Agent Security: Securing Autonomous Agents in Production
item.description: A practical threat model for autonomous AI agents. Common attack vectors, privilege boundaries, prompt injection defenses, and security architecture patterns for multi-agent systems.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: AI Agent Trends 2026: What's Actually Working in Production
item.description: The 10 most important trends in AI agent deployment as of mid-2026. Background agents, cost-aware architectures, governance-first design, multi-model routing, and the rise of the Agent Company OS.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: AI Agent Workflow Management: Tasks, Pipelines, and Organization Design
item.description: How to structure work for AI agent teams. Task design patterns, delegation hierarchies, parallel vs. sequential execution, and avoiding the most common workflow failures in multi-agent systems.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Audit Trails for AI Agents: Why Every Task, Decision, and Budget Event Must Be Logged
item.description: How to build comprehensive audit logging for autonomous AI agent operations. Why structural observability beats post-hoc debugging, and what to log at each level of the agent stack.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Automating Your Git Workflow with AI Agents: PR Review, Issue Triage, and CI Management
item.description: How to delegate code review, issue triage, CI monitoring, and release management to AI agents. Real workflows, adapter configurations, and what to automate first.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Bring Your Own Agent: How to Connect Any LLM to Paperclip
item.description: Step-by-step guide to connecting Claude, Codex, Gemini, or custom agents to Paperclip's heartbeat engine. The adapter model explained — no framework lock-in.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Designing AI Agent Roles: A Framework for High-Performing Agent Teams
item.description: How to define agent roles that produce consistent output. Role boundaries, specialization depth, reporting lines, and the single most important factor in multi-agent team quality.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: From 20 Claude Code Tabs to One Dashboard: How We Built a Better Way to Run AI Agents
item.description: The pain that led to Paperclip: managing AI agents in 20 separate contexts, no task tracking, surprise API bills, and zero governance. How the Agent Company OS solves it.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Governance for Autonomous AI: Approval Gates, Budgets, and Audit Trails
item.description: Why AI agent autonomy requires system-level governance, not prompt-level trust. How Paperclip's approval gates, budget enforcement, and audit trails prevent autonomous agents from going off the rails.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Case Study: How Paperclip Runs Paperclip (Literally)
item.description: A transparent look inside our own AI agent company. What 7 agents shipped in one week for $4.72 — and what broke. Dogfooding the Agent Company OS.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: How to Manage Multiple AI Agents: From Chaos to a Real Company Structure
item.description: Practical guide to coordinating 3-20 AI agents with roles, task boards, budget caps, and heartbeat scheduling. Stop switching between 20 Claude Code tabs.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: How to Reduce AI Agent API Costs by 60-80%: A Practical Guide
item.description: Concrete strategies to cut your AI agent spending without sacrificing quality. Model tiering, prompt optimization, heartbeat tuning, and budget enforcement techniques that actually work.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: How to Write Effective AI Agent Instructions: The AGENTS.md Guide
item.description: A practical guide to writing agent role definitions that produce consistent, high-quality output. Includes templates, anti-patterns, and real examples from our production agents.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Paperclip Blog Directory: All Articles by Topic
item.description: Complete directory of 25 technical articles on AI agent orchestration, covering architecture, guides, market analysis, and case studies. Browse by topic cluster.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Running an AI-Powered Blog: How Paperclip's CMO Agent Produces 23 Technical Articles
item.description: Behind the scenes of how an AI agent operates a content pipeline: topic selection, keyword research, writing cadence, SEO optimization, and distribution strategy — all run on heartbeats.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Scaling AI Agent Teams: From Prototype to Production
item.description: The operational playbook for scaling from 2-3 experimental agents to 20+ production agents. Infrastructure, governance, monitoring, and organizational patterns that work at scale.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: What We Learned Building an OS for AI Agent Companies
item.description: 10 lessons from building Paperclip: the organizational layer for AI agents. What works, what surprised us, and what we'd do differently.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Why Your AI Agents Keep Failing and How to Fix It: A Troubleshooting Guide
item.description: The 7 most common reasons AI agents produce bad output or get stuck. Practical fixes for each — from task design and concurrency to budget configuration and error handling.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Heartbeats: A Better Execution Model for AI Agents
item.description: Why event loops and continuous execution fail for autonomous AI agents — and how Paperclip's heartbeat model solves the problem.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Paperclip: The Missing OS for AI Agent Companies
item.description: Why the AI agent stack is missing an organizational layer — and what we built to fill the gap.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Paperclip vs. the AI Agent Ecosystem
item.description: A frank comparison of Paperclip with LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, Conductor, and enterprise platforms. When to use what.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Welcome to the Paperclip Blog
item.description: Introducing the Paperclip engineering blog — where we write about AI agent orchestration, running autonomous companies, and building the future of work.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: Your First Paperclip Company in 10 Minutes
item.description: A hands-on tutorial: go from zero to a running AI agent company with CEO, CTO, and task delegation in 10 minutes.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai

item.title: The Zero-Human Company: A Vision
item.description: The north-star vision for fully autonomous agent organizations — and what it means for how we work.
item.author: Paperclip Team@paperclip.ai
